name: Anime Opening Energy
tagline: Which OP would you skip the skip button for?

items.text: A sports anime OP — sweat, sunset sprints, and a key change at 0:47
A mecha OP with a choir and a launch sequence that never gets old
A slice-of-life OP — pastel bikes, convenience store lights, soft piano
A shonen OP where the singer screams the title three times
A mystery OP with glitch visuals and a bass drop that feels illegal
A rom-com OP — umbrella scene, puddle reflections, accidental hand touch
An isekai OP with a portal, a sword, and unreasonably good animation
An idol OP with enough lens flare to power a small town
A horror OP that's too catchy for the show's body count
A samurai OP — wind through bamboo, lone figure, taiko drums
A school festival OP with fireworks and a confession that doesn't land yet
A villain reveal OP with a smirk and a minor key twist
A training arc OP — montage, bruises, one new move at the end
A space opera OP with a galaxy map and a vow whispered to the stars
An OP so good you never hear the episode start
A sequel OP that nods to the original melody and makes you cry anyway
